text.title: Serverless Architecture Foundations Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the checklist artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-serverless-foundations.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: checklist_id pattern violation; items count != 10; verdict enum violation; rationale empty; version + date malformed.
